label: Validate Path
description: Extract a value from a step output using a dot-notation path and validate it with assertions.

params.name: variable
params.description: Source variable containing the step output

params.name: path
params.description: Dot-notation path to the value (e.g., content.status)

params.name: store_in_variable
params.description: Optionally store the extracted value in a variable

schema.description: Type depends on the extracted value
